architecture.summary: New requireAdmin() middleware in auth.ts accepting cookie SSO primary + header JWT fallback. Reuse existing UserTokenPayload with isAdmin claim. No new services or data flow changes.

integrations.summary: Reuses existing GitHub OAuth flow, vskill_access/vskill_refresh cookies, ADMIN_GITHUB_USERNAMES env var. No new external integrations.

performance.summary: N/A - No performance impact. Same JWT verification, same cookie reads. Proactive token refresh already exists via vskill_token_exp cookie.

security.summary: Keep Admin table and legacy login as fallback. requireAdmin() accepts cookie SSO primary + header JWT fallback. ADMIN_GITHUB_USERNAMES allowlist unchanged. Clean removal in separate increment.

ui-ux.summary: Non-admin GitHub users see access denied with username and link to main site. Login page auto-redirects if already authenticated with isAdmin. Sidebar shows GitHub avatar and username.

edge-cases.summary: Proactively clear admin_token and admin_refresh_token from localStorage on new layout mount. Legacy header auth kept as fallback. 15min token expiry handled by proactive refresh in admin layout.
